name: HTS_SHIFTS_B
description: Table holding templates for a library shift, shifts can be used to build work patterns.

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Shift

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code entered when creating a shift, in order to help user identify the shift.

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Offset from midnight saved in minutes defining the start time of the shift

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Offset from midnight saved in minutes defining the end time of the shift

columns.Name: WORK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Work duration in minutes of the shift

columns.Name: BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Break duration in minutes of the shift

columns.Name: END_PLUS_DAYS
columns.Comments: Identifies whether the end time offset comes one day after the start time offset (1) or the same day (0)

columns.Name: SHIFT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: A category such as Day or Night that helps classify the Shifts.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
